HON. ROBERT DONDERO; CLERKS: D. BOFFI/V. MU REPORTER: JO ANN BRYCE (206) MASTER JURY CALENDAR OF MAY-24-2004 ASSIGNED TO JURY TRIAL CALENDAR ON MAY-25-2004 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 505, JOHN E. MUNTER. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AT TRIAL CALL. DEFENDANT MOVED TO DISMISS THE CASE. THE COURT GRANTED THE MOTION. CASE IS DISMISSED. AT LATER HEARING ON THE RECORD, THE COURT SET ASIDE THE DISMISSAL AND ASSIGNED THE CASE TO BE TRIED.

ASSSIGNED FOR JURY TRIAL. AFTER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, THE CAUSE IS SETTLED. DEFENDANTS ARE TO PAY PLAINTIFFS THE SUM OF $530,855 BY JUNE 25, 2004 BY MAKING THE PAYMENT TO THE PLAINTIFFS' OFFICE. IN CASE THE PAYMENT IS NOT MADE BY JUNE 25, 2004, THE COURT SETS STATUS CONFERENCE AND JURY TRIAL ON JUNE 28, 2004 AT 9:30 AM. THEN, PLAINTIFFS WILL HAVE AN OPTION TO HAVE JUDMENT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANTS IN THE ABOVE AMOUNT OR WITHDRAW THE SETTLEMENT AND START THE TRIAL. UPON PAYMENT OF THE FULL AMOUNT, PLAINTIFFS WILL FILE DISMISSAL AND THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO GENERAL RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS. PER DIEM FEES OWED:$280 BY PLTFS AND $280 BY DEFTS. JUDGE, JOHN E.
